title: Sing to Me
lyrics: How do you feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me, yeah, and how do you know that I feel about the summertime, summertime with me? Is that a one-taker?
